"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as CheckboxPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-checkbox"
import { Check } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const checkboxCheckboxPrimitiveRoot = tw.style({
    display: "grid",
    placeContent: "place-content-center",
    height: "h-4",
    width: "w-4",
    flexShrink: "shrink-0",
    borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
    borderWidth: ["border", "border-primary"],
    boxShadow: "shadow",
    "focus-visible": {
        outlineStyle: "focus-visible:outline-none",
        boxShadow: ["focus-visible:ring-1", "focus-visible:ring-ring"],
    },
    disabled: {
        cursor: "disabled:cursor-not-allowed",
        opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
    },
    "data-[state=checked]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[state=checked]:bg-primary",
        color: "data-[state=checked]:text-primary-foreground",
    },
});

const Checkbox = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <CheckboxPrimitive.Root
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(checkboxCheckboxPrimitiveRoot.class(), className)}
    {...props}
  >
    <CheckboxPrimitive.Indicator
      className={tw.join("grid place-content-center text-current")}
    >
      <Check className={tw.join("h-4 w-4")} />
    </CheckboxPrimitive.Indicator>
  </CheckboxPrimitive.Root>
))
Checkbox.displayName = CheckboxPrimitive.Root.displayName

export { Checkbox }
